extracted.title: Paradis Lateral Pipeline Maintenance (HoumaSEG), April 21 – May 19, 2026
extracted.description:
Columbia Gulf Transmission LLC (CGT) reminds customers of upcoming pipeline maintenance on the Paradis Lateral beginning on Tuesday April 21, 2026, through Tuesday, May 19, 2026. As a result, the Forwardhaul capacity through HoumaSEG will be reduced to 0 Dth effective Timely Cycle for Gas Day Tuesday, April 21, 2026.

CGT anticipates this restriction may result in curtailments to Interruptible, Secondary Firm, and Primary Firm services. Please see the details provided below for more information.

HoumaSEG
• Estimated Capacity Setting: 0 Dth
• Design Capacity: 123,800 Dth
• Posted Percentage: 0%

Due to the potential impact to firm service, CGT encourages customers to monitor the scheduled volumes on the Operationally Available Capacity screen on Informational Postings, as nominations can fluctuate based on market conditions.

Reservation Charge Credits (RCCs) will be determined per the process set forth in the General Terms and Conditions, Section 40 of CGT’s FERC Gas Tariff (Tariff). By means of this notice, CGT is establishing the 7-day Average Usage Quantity to be the period of April 7-13, 2026, pursuant to the provisions in the Tariff.

Please contact your Customer Services Representative with any questions.
